components.summary: Proxmox 9.2.3 active; VM100 and VM101 running; storage active.
Core containers active; Portainer 8000 warning confirmed; PostgreSQL not externally exposed.
Samba active with expected teaching shares; nmbd inactive.
Low utilization observed; disk health and backup recoverability not tested.
Backup existence and freshness were outside the command allowlist.

findings.summary: Portainer 8000 is published and listening but not allowed by UFW.
Samba firewall rules accept any reachable source; intended network scope needs confirmation.
Current backup existence, freshness and restoreability were not verified.

risks: Offline documentation can become stale without periodic controlled capture.
Published service ports require scope review even when host firewall blocks one of them.
Backup existence must not be inferred from storage availability.
